title: flintronic Spirit Level Magnetic, 300mm/12Inch Level Tool Aluminium Alloy, with 3 Bubble 45°,90°,180°, Shock Proof Torpedo Level, Lightweight Portable, for Measurement, Acceptance
features: 【High-Quality Drop-Resistant Materials】Crafted with high-impact aluminum alloy and shock-resistant rubber end caps, the spirit level absorbs impact to protect the vial and frame. It’s lightweight, wear-resistant, and 100% waterproof, withstanding wear, and moisture even in tough working conditions for long-lasting reliable use.

【Magnetic Base Design】Equipped with a powerful magnetic system, the level securely attaches to steel and iron surfaces, metal structures, pipes, or steel beams. It enables hands-free operation, freeing up your hands for aligning and adjusting.

【3-Bubble Vial Design】Features three easy-to-read vials (0°/horizontal, 90°/vertical, 45°) crafted from highly transparent acrylic glass. Bright fluorescent liquid and smooth inner contours enhance visibility, allowing for quick and accurate angle readings.

【How to Use】Start by placing the level on the surface, ensuring it’s parallel to the area being measured. Check the bubble at eye level—if it’s centered between the marked lines, the surface is perfectly level. For best results, repeat the check on multiple spots of the surface to confirm consistency.

【Multipurpose Application】Ideal for home improvement, decoration, carpentry, woodworking, metal parts installation, and door/window leveling. Compact 300mm/400mm size fits tight spaces, making it suitable for builders, plumbers, tradesmen, and DIY enthusiasts alike.
description: Features: -Built with a high-impact frame and shock-absorbing design, it resists drops and wear for long-lasting durability in tough working conditions. -Boasts high accuracy of ±0.5 mm, making it ideal for DIY projects, construction work, and all applications requiring reliable precision. -This magnetic spirit level has hanging holes on both ends. These small holes allow it to be hung for easy storage and convenient transport. -Ideal for builders, carpenters, plumbers, and DIY enthusiasts, this professional spirit level delivers precise, reliable performance for all leveling tasks. Specification: -Material: Aluminum Alloy -Size: 30*4.95*2cm/11.8*1.95*0.79in -Weight: 187g -Color: Yellow Package Includes: -Spirit Level*1PC Notice: - We are always committed to providing our customers with the pleasant shopping experience.
